nasb.text: The anger of the Lord burned against Israel, and He sold them into the hands of the Philistines and into the hands of the sons of Ammon.

esv.text: So the anger of the Lord was kindled against Israel, and he sold them into the hand of the Philistines and into the hand of the Ammonites,

cnv.text: 耶和華的怒氣向以色列人發作，就把他們交在非利士人的手中和亞捫人的手中。

ccb.text: 耶和华向他们发怒，把他们交在非利士人和亚扪人手中。
